info.title: Lucid Web Craftsman — Supabase Edge Functions
info.description: GENERATED by scripts/openapi-edge-functions.mjs. Do not hand-edit; run npm run openapi:edge-functions. Optional per-function detail: supabase/functions/<name>/openapi.fragment.json

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

application/json.description: JSON body per function implementation; add openapi.fragment.json for detail.

get.description: Invoked as GET https://<project>.supabase.co/functions/v1/generate-sitemap (unless overridden). See supabase/functions/generate-sitemap/index.ts. Uses GET; body usually empty.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

post.summary: Return one order + its items for a valid 15-minute HMAC order_access token
post.description: Token-gated public endpoint for the /order-confirmation page. The HMAC token (minted by sign-order-token) is the sole auth gate; the handler runs with the service role and bypasses RLS. Response metadata is whitelisted to customer_email and payment_method_label; shipping_address is whitelisted to the keys the storefront UI consumes.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

200.description: Order payload. `order.metadata` is whitelisted (see description). `items` is always an array (null normalized to [])

shipping_address.description: Whitelisted: first_name, last_name, email, address_line1, postal_code, city, country.

400.description: Invalid JSON body, or body missing a non-empty string token

401.description: Token failed HMAC verify / expired / shape invalid, OR token valid but type is not order_access. A 401 with an HTML body means the Supabase gateway rejected the apikey header — not this function.

404.description: Token is valid but the order row does not exist

429.description: Rate limit hit (per order_id) — includes Retry-After header

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate-limit window resets

500.description: Database error or unexpected throw. Response body is always a generic string — internal error details never leak to the client.

token.description: HMAC-signed order_access token (15-min TTL). Format: <base64url-payload>.<base64url-signature>. Minted by sign-order-token.

post.summary: Resolve order from signed email token

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

200.description: found and order snapshot or found=false

token.description: Signed token from order confirmation link

order_reference.description: Optional CMD-... reference; must match token

post.summary: Look up order by order_id (canonical) or Stripe session_id (legacy)
post.description: Invoked as POST https://<project>.supabase.co/functions/v1/order-lookup (unless overridden). See supabase/functions/order-lookup/index.ts.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

parameters.name: x-guest-id
parameters.description: Guest session id for order ownership checks.

200.description: found=false hides unauthorized rows; otherwise order subset

schema.description: Send exactly one identifier: if both order_id and session_id are present, order_id wins.

session_id.description: Stripe Checkout Session id (cs_...) or mis-encoded order UUID
